name: How to Build a Digital Marketing Agency With Judy Lin
episode_summary: Judy Lin is the founder of Digital Marketing Doctor, which helps medical professionals establish their online presence, attract more patients, and increase revenue through digital marketing and branding services. With over a decade of experience, Judy specializes in SEO, social media marketing, and online reputation management. Her goal is to assist healthcare providers in leveraging the power of digital marketing to improve patient outcomes and grow their practices.
episode_summary_rich_text:
Madeline Johnson interviews Judy Lin, CEO of Digital Marketing Doctor Agency in California, and they discuss digital marketing strategies for clients. Key takeaways include:

  • Offer a One-Stop Shop solution for your clients
  • Define the brand vision before launching digital campaigns
  • How to take a holistic approach to campaigns
  • Why to prioritize digital and online efforts
  • How to keep up with industry changes
